title: Lagos traffic agency expands early rush patrols
description: New patrol schedule targets bottlenecks on major bridges.
content: The Lagos traffic agency has expanded early rush patrols across key corridors. Officials say the updated schedule will focus on bridge entry points and arterial roads to reduce delays during peak hours.

title: Eko Island business district opens late-night transport loop
description: New shuttles connect key districts after 9pm.
content: A late-night transport loop has been introduced to serve workers leaving the business district after 9pm. The shuttle route covers major bus stops and commercial hubs.

title: Market associations publish new price watch list
description: Staple food prices show slight week-on-week dip.
content: Market associations released a new price watch list indicating a slight decline in staple food prices. Traders attribute the change to improved supply routes.

title: Health ministry announces weekend vaccination drive
description: Pop-up clinics open in five local government areas.
content: The health ministry has announced a weekend vaccination drive with pop-up clinics in five local government areas. Residents are encouraged to bring valid ID for registration.

title: New tech hub opens in Yaba for early-stage founders
description: Workspace includes labs, mentorship, and demo days.
content: A new tech hub in Yaba has opened with shared labs, founder offices, and weekly mentorship sessions. The hub plans to host monthly demo days for local startups.

title: Coastal advisory issued ahead of weekend storms
description: Mariners advised to monitor wave height alerts.
content: Coastal authorities issued an advisory ahead of expected weekend storms. Mariners are advised to monitor wave height alerts and avoid overnight trips.

title: Community sports league announces youth scouting event
description: Local clubs open tryouts at Surulere stadium.
content: The community sports league will host a youth scouting event at Surulere stadium. Local clubs will open tryouts for players aged 14 to 19.

title: University senate approves new internship policy
description: Students get credit for approved placements.
content: The university senate approved a new internship policy that grants credit for approved placements. Departments will publish partner lists this month.

title: City council outlines new streetlight maintenance plan
description: Priority corridors receive rapid repairs.
content: The city council outlined a maintenance plan targeting streetlight outages. Priority corridors will receive rapid repairs and monthly inspections.

title: Power distribution company restores feeder after outage
description: Technicians complete overnight repairs.
content: The power distribution company says technicians restored a key feeder after an overnight outage. Residents are asked to report remaining interruptions through the hotline.

title: Lagoon cleanup initiative deploys new waste boats
description: Three new vessels join the cleanup fleet.
content: Environmental officials have deployed three new waste collection boats for lagoon cleanup. The expanded fleet targets plastics and floating debris.

title: Ride-hailing drivers announce service safety workshop
description: Workshops cover customer care and night routes.
content: Ride-hailing driver unions announced a service safety workshop series focused on customer care and night route protocols. Sessions start next week.

title: Waterworks completes emergency pipeline repair
description: Pressure restored to key neighborhoods.
content: The waterworks authority completed emergency repairs on a burst pipeline, restoring pressure to several neighborhoods. Further monitoring is planned this week.

title: Startup demo night draws investors from across the city
description: Founders pitch fintech and logistics ideas.
content: The latest startup demo night drew investors from across the city. Founders showcased new fintech, logistics, and healthtech solutions.

title: Local art fair opens with weekend workshops
description: Artists host free lessons for youth.
content: A local art fair opened this weekend, offering workshops for youth and emerging artists. Organizers say the program will run every Saturday this month.

title: Public health alert issued for heat advisory
description: Residents urged to hydrate and limit midday exposure.
content: Public health officials issued a heat advisory, urging residents to hydrate and limit midday exposure. Cooling centers are open at designated clinics.

title: Rail authority confirms trial schedule for new corridor
description: Passenger trial runs begin Monday.
content: The rail authority confirmed trial schedules for the new corridor. Passenger trial runs will begin Monday with limited capacity.

title: Sports commission launches weekend fitness pop-ups
description: Free fitness sessions rotate across districts.
content: The sports commission announced weekend fitness pop-ups with free sessions rotating across districts. Residents can register online for updates.

title: Community groups plan neighborhood security meeting
description: Town hall invites residents and local officers.
content: Community groups are planning a neighborhood security meeting with local officers. The town hall will cover patrol timing and contact numbers.

title: Clean energy forum opens registrations for volunteers
description: Forum focuses on solar training and career paths.
content: Registration is open for volunteers at the clean energy forum. The event focuses on solar training, career paths, and local partnerships.
